summary.summary: Jena Malone (calling as Ode Malone's parent) called to reschedule her son Ode's 10:30 virtual assessment because they were running errands and wouldn't be home in time. Roman confirmed a new time of 1:30 and said Paola would resend the updated virtual meeting link. Friendly, quick rescheduling call.

action_items.item: Resend the virtual assessment meeting link updated for the new 1:30 time

record_updates.whats_going_on: Parent called to reschedule Ode's virtual assessment from 10:30 to 1:30 today because the family was out running errands. Assessment is virtual (diagnostic).
record_updates.what_we_can_do_to_help: Paola to resend the updated virtual meeting link for the 1:30 assessment today, then proceed with the diagnostic and follow up with recommendations.
